title: Campaign of Asad against al-Ghur
description: This year Mad b. 'Abdallah campaigned against Ghiuin. Thabit Qutnah said: I see Asad157 in war when it comes to him, And he fights the enemy; he wins and imposes. He took al-Sabal's1S8 land, of which the Khagan is the guardian, Burning whatever resisted him and destroying. Groups of the Turks came to you (from) what is between Kabul And Ghurin, for they did not escape from you by flight. The enemies did not overwhelm a lion of the jungle,

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
